ogTitle: Nerramyne vs New Norcia: Climate Safety

heading: Nerramyne vs New Norcia — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nerramyne, Western Australia and New Norcia, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nerramyne and New Norcia have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Nerramyne or New Norcia safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nerramyne has a flood risk score of 38/100, while New Norcia scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nerramyne scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. New Norcia scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nerramyne or New Norcia?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nerramyne has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
